title: Who is rich in France?
subhed: Is a childless couple wealthy if they earn €6,438 per month after taxes? A new report seeks to address the lack of set criteria for measuring this demographic.

title: Pascal Ory, historian: Edgar Morin's 'acute sensitivity to the spirit of the times made him a trailblazer'
subhed: The member of the Académie Française pays tribute to sociologist Edgar Morin, who died on Friday at the age of 104, highlighting how Morin's life and work were driven by an enduring urge to experiment.

title: Like PSG, the Knicks successfully rebuilt by ditching superstars
subhed: The New York Knicks open the NBA finals on Wednesday against Victor Wembanyama's Spurs. Much like Paris Saint-Germain, the Knicks had to reinvent themselves after years of frustration.

title: Edgar Morin: 'I doubt humanity even as I believe in it'
